working_on.notes: Build APK successful. Bugfix campaign Phase 1-4 completed successfully. Ready to implement Continuous Reading in Landscape mode.

recent_changes.description: Phase 2 & 4: Implemented RssRepository memory caching and MainViewModel continuous mark-as-read.
Phase 3: URL/ID Normalization to prevent duplicate items from utm_ tracking tags.

errors_encountered.error: Build failed due to missing SDK path

decisions_made.decision: Implemented SQL-based ID filtering instead of loading all to RAM
Added ConcurrentHashMap memory cache for read status
decisions_made.reason: Eliminates race condition while DB write is pending
